title: Food Lover’s Market Garden Route Mall: Best in Fresh
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be voted...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are excited to be voted Best Fresh Produce Store in the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards 2025.


> From your full trolleys to your loyal votes, thank you for letting us be part of your shopping experience.


Fresh is where our story began, and it’s still at the heart of everything we do.

From the crunch of a delicious apple to the sweet scent of sun-ripened citrus, our mission is simple: to bring you the freshest seasonal fruit and veg at the best possible value, with every aisle bursting with colour, flavour and abundance.

We have our local farmers to thank for this. Their dedication and care ensure we get produce at its peak, so you enjoy that just picked freshness in every dish. And because we love local, we keep our prices fair and honest, ensuring that great food remains within everyone’s reach.

But there’s more than fresh fruit and veg at Food Lover’s Market.

Our bakery fills the air with the smell of warm bread and pastries made from scratch every day, perfect with a cup of Seattle Coffee.

The deli offers a variety of cheeses, cold meats, and grab-and-go favourites for your next cheeseboard, while our butchery has cuts that will be the star of your next braai.

And for something lighter, our freshly made sushi pairs beautifully with a glass of wine from our wine selection for a cosy night in.

Food Lover’s Market is more than what’s on the shelves; it’s about the people and communities we serve.

One organisation close to our hearts is Môreson Children’s & Youth Care Centre, which provides a safe and loving home for 100 children aged 3 to 18. Supporting Môreson is part of our commitment to fighting hunger and food insecurity all year round, because we believe every plate matters, and every act of kindness can change a life.

At the heart of our store is our manager, Bertram Wienand, who loves George as much as you do. With years of experience and a passion for people, Bertram ensures every visit feels like a warm welcome.

Winning Best Fresh Produce store is a reminder to keep showing up for our customers and our community every day. To everyone who shops with us, supports us, and votes for us: we’ll keep it fresh, keep it local, and keep bringing you real food and real value.

Thank you again, George.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
